title: penaea candolleana
intro: Penaea candolleana is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae, commonly known as the yellow tree or yellow thyme tree. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Penaea candolleana include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
